title: Paulinella micropora KR01 assembled transcripts
author: Timothy Stephens
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Description of files: 

  5RACE_Combined_D_L_assembly.fa  

 Transcripts assembled from 5-prime enriched RNA sequencing reads (cap-switching transcripts). Read data available from NCBI’s SRA repository (BioProject ID PRJNA730897). 

  Standard_RNAseq_transcripts.fa  

 Transcripts assembled from standard RNA sequencing reads (standard transcripts) that align to the  P. micropora  KR01 genome. Read data available from NCBI’s SRA repository (BioProject ID PRJNA568118). 

  5RACE_Combined_D_L_assembly_mapped.seqnames.txt  

 Names of the cap-switching transcripts that align to the  P. micropora  KR01 genome. 

  5RACE_Combined_D_L_assembly_unmapped.seqnames.txt  

 Names of the cap-switching transcripts that no not align to the  P. micropora  KR01 genome. 

  5RACE_SL_Transcripts.seqnames.txt  

 Names of the cap-switching transcripts that align to the  P. micropora  KR01 genome and encode a  Paulinella  spliced-leader sequence. 

  5RACE_SL_Transcripts_unique2RACE.seqnames.txt  

 Names of the cap-switching transcripts that align to the  P. micropora  KR01 genome, encode a  Paulinella  spliced-leader sequence, and are unique to the cap-switching dataset (i.e., are not encoded in the standard transcripts). 

  Standard_RNAseq_SL_transcripts.seqnames.txt  

 Names of the standard transcripts that align to the  P. micropora  KR01 genome and encode a  Paulinella  spliced-leader sequence.
